CREATE TABLE test_table (k CHAR, w UInt64);
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id UInt64, score UInt64);
SELECT topKWeighted(2)(k, w) FROM test_table JOIN test_table_2 ON test_table.w = test_table_2.id;
SELECT topKWeighted(3)(k, w) FROM (SELECT k, SUM(w) as w FROM test_table GROUP BY k) AS nested_query;
SELECT k, topKWeighted(2)(k, SUM(w)) OVER (PARTITION BY k) as weighted_values FROM test_table GROUP BY k;
SELECT topKWeighted(2)(k, w) FROM test_table WHERE w > 1;
SELECT topKWeighted(2)(k, w) FROM (SELECT k, SUM(w) as w FROM test_table GROUP BY k HAVING w > 5) AS filtered;
CREATE TABLE test_table_3 (category CHAR, weight UInt64);
SELECT category, topKWeighted(3)(category, weight) FROM test_table_3 GROUP BY category;
